name: Fiat Wallet
description: USDC wallet with fiat onramp. Deposit USD or EUR via bank transfer and spend autonomously via x402.

dailySpendLimit.label: Daily Spend Limit (USDC)
dailySpendLimit.help: Maximum amount the agent can spend per day via x402 payments

monthlySpendLimit.label: Monthly Spend Limit (USDC)
monthlySpendLimit.help: Maximum amount the agent can spend per month via x402 payments

perTransactionLimit.label: Per Transaction Limit (USDC)
perTransactionLimit.help: Maximum amount the agent can spend in a single x402 payment

autoInjectBalance.label: Auto-inject balance into context
autoInjectBalance.help: Agent always knows its current balance and spend limits before responding

perTransactionLimit.description: Per transaction x402 spend limit in USDC
